intro.email: Sign in with email + password (same as on the website). Token is stored in the system keychain.
intro.token: Paste your at_live_… API key from the web app (Settings → API Keys).

errors.sessionExpired: Session expired, please sign in again
errors.backendUnreachableHint: Check your internet connection or try again.

retry.title: Cannot reach the server
retry.description: We were unable to contact {{host}}. Check your internet connection or try again.

footer.noAccount: No account? Sign up at kdpbook.click.
footer.createKey: Create a key at kdpbook.click → Settings → API Keys.
